PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-10-2016 Continued To Oct-03-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Elaine Kitano & Patrick Kitano in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that there were concerns regarding the recently filed amended petition and asked the purpose of filing it. Ms. Kitano stated that it was filed to change the court date and that they had tried to get assistance but could not. The Court stated that once you file an amended petition it triggers issues such as notice, that there has been back and forth with the examiner who is unable to provide assistance, that it feels that there will continue to be issues and instructed the petitioners to obtain counsel. Ms. Kitano stated that they re-noticed and re-published and that they were told by Tanya that it had been filed. The Court stated that it has not seen the documents, that it will continue the matter to give them time to get counsel involved and that having counsel will save a lot of time towards the end result. Ms. Kitano stated that she has the paperwork that Tanya filed and thought that the Court would have it as well. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to October 3, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
